description: Multi-agent cross-verified niche search. Single cloud session, small scale: 3 candidates, 1 epoch. Four sequential subagents (sourcer -> merger -> verifier -> cross-checker), each commits AND pushes before the next spawns; the MAIN agent runs the deterministic 4-gate filter, [REPORT] verbatim injection, determinism + hallucination checks, and the final verdict. Builds on the proven Step 1/Step 2 loop (runs/run_014_*).

agents.commit_msg: Run 15 AGENT 1 (sourcer): 3 real arXiv ML atoms
Run 15 AGENT 2 (merger): Opus subprocess merges -> candidates
Run 15 AGENT 4 (cross-checker): independent re-verification of AGENT 3

merge_schema.primary_quote: verbatim string >=30 chars copied EXACTLY from atom_a or atom_b source text (NOT paraphrased)

opus_subprocess.note: PROVEN fix (R3): merge subprocess runs in a throwaway NON-GIT temp dir with all tools disallowed, so the host git Stop-hook bails (not a git repo) instead of hijacking the merge output. Force raw JSON (R4); robust parse with 1 retry.

gates.gate_4_belinda: primary_quote is a real >=30-char substring of the named atom AND mechanism contains >=1 mechanism-vocab verb AND operator not in rejected_operators

gate1_note: Run 15 raises the composite threshold to 0.90 (Step 2 used 0.85). With real novelty inputs this is intentionally strict; saturation is the expected outcome at this scale.

hard_rules.R1: spawn agents sequentially (each commits+pushes before next spawns)
hard_rules.R2: commit AND push after every agent (container is ephemeral; local commit alone dies on wipe)
hard_rules.R4: force raw JSON from Opus, robust parse with 1 retry
hard_rules.R5: record ONLY web_search results actually seen — never fabricate URLs/IDs
hard_rules.R6: [REPORT] = verbatim raw agent output (code-injected ground truth)
hard_rules.R8: do NOT activate the .claude/settings.json pre_tool hook in container
hard_rules.R9: if session feels long -> commit partial + report, don't push through timeout
hard_rules.R10: honest verdict: collision = saturation confirmed; survivor = re-verify with 10 more

honest_io_policy: All web_search results are recorded verbatim, exactly as returned. Per-result snippets are recorded only if the tool provides them; otherwise the snippet field is empty (never invented). Empty/anomalous results are recorded as such. This is enforced socially in agent prompts (R5) and mechanically by AGENT 4's independent re-verification (R7).
